samples.pinyin: tā shì wǒ de hǎo huǒbàn.
samples.en: He is my good partner.

samples.sentence: 他找到了一個商業夥伴。
samples.pinyin: tā zhǎodàole yīgè shāngyè huǒbàn.
samples.en: He found a business partner.

samples.pinyin: zhè shì yīgè mòshēng de dìfāng.
samples.en: This is a strange place.
samples.vi: Đây là một địa phương xa lạ.

samples.sentence: 他對我來説還是很陌生。
samples.pinyin: tā duì wǒ lái shuō háishì hěn mòshēng.
samples.en: He is still very unfamiliar to me.
samples.vi: Anh ấy đối với tôi vẫn còn rất xa lạ.

samples.pinyin: Tā bèi zhěnduàn chū xìngbìng le.
samples.en: He was diagnosed with a venereal disease.

samples.sentence: 他因傳播性病罪被判刑。
samples.pinyin: Tā yīn chuánbō xìngbìngzuì bèi pànxíng.
samples.en: He was sentenced for spreading sexually transmitted diseases.

samples.sentence: 她對這個問題有很深的偏見。
samples.pinyin: tā duì zhège wèntí yǒu hěn shēn de piānjiàn.
samples.en: She has a strong bias about this issue.

samples.sentence: 我希望你能消除對他的偏見。
samples.pinyin: wǒ xīwàng nǐ néng xiāochú duì tā de piānjiàn.
samples.en: I hope you can dispel your prejudice against him.

samples.sentence: 她的時間總是先花在孩子們身上。
samples.pinyin: tā de shíjiān zǒng shì xiān huā zài háizimen shēnshang.
samples.en: The children always have first call on her time.

samples.sentence: 希望寄託在青年人身上。
samples.pinyin: xīwàng jìtuō zài qīngnián rén shēnshang.
samples.en: Our hopes are placed on the young people.

samples.sentence: 她從來不主動接近異性。
samples.pinyin: tā cónglái bu zhǔdòng jiējìn yìxìng.
samples.en: She never takes the initiative to approach the opposite sex.

samples.sentence: 他對異性有很強的吸引力。
samples.pinyin: tā duì yìxìng yǒu hěn qiáng de xīyǐn lì.
samples.en: He has a strong attraction to the opposite sex.

items.vi: người có tình rồi sẽ thành thân thuộc

samples.pinyin: mòrì de jǐngxiàng lìng rén hàipà.
samples.en: The visions of doomsday are frightening.
samples.vi: Cảnh tượng của ngày tận thế khiến người ta sợ hãi.

samples.sentence: 他們相信末日即將到來。
samples.pinyin: tāmen xiāngxìn mòrì jíjiāng dàolái.
samples.en: They believe that the end of the world is nigh.
samples.vi: Họ tin rằng ngày tận thế sắp đến.

samples.pinyin: qǐng bǎ túpiàn kuòdà yīdiǎn.
samples.en: Please expand the picture a bit.

samples.sentence: 我們需要擴大市場份額。
samples.pinyin: wǒmen xūyào kuòdà shìchǎng fèn'é.
samples.en: We need to expand our market share.

samples.sentence: 活動的範圍僅限於校內。
samples.pinyin: huódòng de fànwéi jǐn xiànyú xiàonèi.
samples.en: The scope of the activity is limited to the campus.
samples.vi: Phạm vi hoạt động giới hạn trong trường.

samples.sentence: 研究範圍包括多個領域。
samples.pinyin: yánjiū fànwéi bāokuò duō gè lǐngyù.
samples.en: The research scope includes multiple fields.

samples.pinyin: biǎo dá qīng nián de xīn shēng
samples.en: Voice the aspirations of the young people

samples.sentence: 這反映了全國要求改革的心聲。
samples.pinyin: zhè fǎnyìng le quánguó yāoqiú gǎigé de xīnshēng.
samples.en: This gives expression to the national aspirations for reforms.

samples.pinyin: yìhuì fèichúle gāi fǎ'àn.
samples.en: The parliament repealed the bill.

samples.sentence: 反傾銷法案得到了通過。
samples.pinyin: fǎnqīngxiāo fǎ'àn dédào le tōngguò.
samples.en: The anti-dumping bill has been passed.

samples.pinyin: yīng lián bāng
samples.en: The British Commonwealth of Nations

samples.sentence: 我是馬薩諸塞聯邦的資深參議員。
